description: Input schema for Kling Video v2.6 Motion Control.

image.description: Reference image for the video. Supported formats: JPEG, PNG, WebP.
image.title: Image

video.description: Reference video providing the motion to follow.
video.title: Video

prompt.description: Optional text prompt to guide the generation.
prompt.title: Prompt

character_orientation.description: Whether the output orientation matches the reference image or video.

keep_original_sound.description: Whether to keep the original sound from the reference video.
keep_original_sound.title: Keep Original Sound

tier.description: Model tier. Pro has higher quality ($0.112/s), standard is cheaper ($0.07/s).
